title: Of Alexander Crummell
venue: A. C. McClurg and Co., Chicago

license.note: Published 1903; public domain in the United States.

abstract: Of Alexander Crummell (1903), by W. E. B. Du Bois. From The Souls of Black Folk.
excerpt: Then from the Dawn it seemed there came, but faint As from beyond the limit of the world, Like the last echo born of a great cry, Sounds, as if some fair city were one voice Around a king returning from his wars. TENNYSON. [Illustration]...
